bio.suffix: — moving closer to users, one decision at a time.

fullBio.heading: About
fullBio.content:
I work at the seam where **engineering meets product thinking**.

My background is in system engineering, web development, and product operations across edtech and enterprise platforms. Lately, I've been spending more time on the product side of that work sitting closer to users, sharpening how decisions get made, and asking better questions before writing code.

I'm currently exploring how to bring that lens to product management. If you want to trade notes or build something together, my links are below.
